hero.name: Ibrahima
hero.subtitle: Backend developer and CS student
hero.bio: I build APIs, train AI models locally and care about clean backend architecture. Currently studying 2nd year at École Supérieure Polytechnique of Dakar.

about:
I'm a second year Software Engineering student at École Supérieure Polytechnique of Dakar. I focus on backend development: building APIs, designing databases, writing robust code. Recently I've been exploring AI/ML, fine-tuning models and building tools around them.
In team projects I tend to gravitate towards the backend: routing, auth, data models and deployment.

projects.title: MSM - Marketplace de Services Ménagers
projects.short_desc: Web application to connect cleaning personnel and clients. Deployed through Render
projects.long_desc: This application was built as a uni project in a team of 2. It allows for clients to find cleaning personnel, filter by service type (cleaning the house, ironing clothes, etc), schedule, and rating. Both parties verify identity on signup for safety purposes. Deployed on Render
projects.my_part: I was in charge of the backend, so I designed the routes, database architecture, data models and auth. I later deployed it through Render

projects.title: AI File Renamer - LoRA Fine-tuning
projects.short_desc: Fine-tuned a local LLM to rename files based on their content
projects.long_desc: Trained gemma-4-e4b-it-4bit (downloaded from HuggingFace) with LoRA adapters through MLX. Built a synthetic dataset of 57 examples with 5 validation tests. After training, the model went from failing the task to succeeding consistently
projects.my_part: Solo project: dataset creation, training pipeline, evaluation

projects.title: PHP News Website
projects.short_desc: Web application to present news articles built in PHP
projects.long_desc: This application was a uni project made with a team of 3. It's a news platform with role-based access (editor/admin), category filtering and full article management. Everything is persisted in a MySQL database.
projects.my_part: I built the API that allows full CRUD of users, articles and categories, secured the routes (only allowing access to certain routes if the user has the right role), connected the MySQL database with PDO, ensured data validation, XSS prevention and proper consumption of the API by the client-side JavaScript.

projects.title: Java Library Management project
projects.short_desc: Program that manages a library's activities written in Java
projects.long_desc: Uni project built in a team of 4. It allows for full CRUD of books, users, deliveries, borrowing, vehicles, etc. Everything is stored in a MySQL database through DAO objects
projects.my_part: I wrote the Livre, Livraison and Annexe classes, connected the database through JDBC, built the DAO classes for Livre and Annexe and designed the Main scenario to test the classes. I also proposed the UML class diagram that we followed to create the different classes and wrote the README.md to describe the project.

projects.title: Multithreaded automation tool in Rust
projects.short_desc: Program that simulates mouse clicks and takes care of eating automatically in Minecraft. Written in Rust.
projects.long_desc: This is a personal project I worked on to learn how to code in Rust. It simulates left clicks at a fixed interval and automatically switches slots to eat after some time has passed. It listens on a different thread for a keyboard shortcut to stop running. Everything is configurable through modifying constants.
projects.my_part: This is a solo project. I implemented every functionality, made it configurable and wrote a detailed README.md for it on GitHub.
